zh: 不管孩子是否通過鑑定測驗、
en: Whether or not your child passes any assessment,
and whether or not you choose early enrollment,

zh: 一般生活常規的教導都是非常必要的、
en: teaching basic life skills is absolutely essential.

zh: 會說出自己不舒服的感覺、
en: Being able to say when they feel unwell,

zh: 還會使用飲水機、自己上廁所、
en: use a water dispenser, go to the toilet alone,
make a phone call, and play simple games,

zh: 也會認得家到學校的路、
en: as well as recognize the way from home to school —

zh: 對即將進入國小生活的孩子而言重要得多了。
en: matter far more to a child about to enter elementary school.
